nasb.text: but the centurion, wanting to bring Paul safely through, kept them from their intention, and commanded that those who could swim should jump overboard first and get to land,

esv.text: But the centurion, wishing to save Paul, kept them from carrying out their plan. He ordered those who could swim to jump overboard first and make for the land,

cnv.text: 但百夫長想要救保羅，就阻止他們這樣行。他吩咐會游泳的跳下水去，先到岸上，

ccb.text: 但百夫长为了救保罗，不准他们轻举妄动，下令会游泳的先跳到海里游上岸。

csbs.text: 可是百夫长想救保罗，就拦阻了他们的计划，命令会游泳的人跳下船，先到岸上去，
